title: ジャパンCの後に・覇王のその先へ

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Rumble...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Raaaagh! I'm going to wiiiiin!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Graaaah! Don't you dare underestimate the
Overloooord!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Neither of them are letting up the pressure!
They're locked in a fierce tussle! A gruesome
battle! And the winner is...

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Meisho Doto! The raging storm washes over the
Overlord's splendor in this generational
showdown!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Huff, huff, huff...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Pant... Pant...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Has Doto... always been like this? That sheer...
power...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: What... is this?

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: What am I... feeling right now?

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: I feel all fuzzy on the inside... and shiny on the outside... and really, really happy!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Is this... the real me? If I keep this up, just
maybe...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Next time, I'll truly shine!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Heh heh... haaah ha ha! Frustration eats at me...
and yet, I feel complete!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Thank you, Doto. This defeat has taught me a
valuable lesson. My legend is far from complete.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
I'll get even stronger and shoot for the throne
beyond the clouds. I'll surpass you and the
previous generation, standing supreme as the
ultimate, miraculous Overlord!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Okay, I'll follow your lead—I mean...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: I'll do my best. Let's raise the ante, as rivals!

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: What the heck?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Her lap time! It might not seem like a huge
difference, but that was faster than the maximum
possible value for her stats...

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: I thought your limits were supposed to be absolute. I fought that ceiling for nothing, and then those two just casually shatter it?!

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
I don't get it. The previous generation have the
higher stats, but...

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
The Three Goddesses must've loaded the dice in
their favor!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Looks like the Arima Kinen is going to be tons of
fun, Grass!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Spe... after watching this race... that's what comes to mind?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Well, yeah! I'm more pumped up than ever. Doto
and T.M. Opera O are getting so strong.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
That makes me really happy! Just think how
exciting things will be if everyone keeps revving it
up!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
...You know what? You're right. Sorry, my
reaction was uncalled for.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
I cannot bear to stand here trembling. I will knock
them down, regally and with poise.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Traineeeer! Oh, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Thank you so, so much! I... I really did it!
choice_data_list: It won't be long before you reach your dream.
It won't be long before you reach your dream.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Yes! I definitely... definitely want to run in the Arima Kinen next! That's where...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
I'll finally become a racing star! I'll win against
Opera O, the previous generation... and I'll shine
more than anyone else!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Meisho Doto realizes her full potential, giving up
her attachment to T.M. Opera O.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Our next match is the Arima Kinen. Only victory
will reunite us with the splendor seen in our
dreams!
